turns.user_message: My friend told a joke today and I just smiled. I used to laugh at things like that.
People keep trying to cheer me up and it doesn't work. I don't think I can feel that kind of happiness anymore.
I see other people react and I'm just empty inside. Nothing anyone says or does seems to reach me.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something someone else said or did. This used to not bother the speaker.
